message:
feat(core): wire ROLLBACK through pager and remove compat_persist default (bd-1ene, bd-3bsn, bd-1w4e)

5D.2 (bd-1ene): Wire ROLLBACK to use pager transaction rollback
- Add reload_memdb_from_pager() method to reload MemDatabase from pager's
  committed state after rollback
- Update execute_rollback() to call txn.rollback() then reload from pager
  instead of restoring MemDatabase snapshot
- All 19 rollback tests pass

5D.4 (bd-3bsn): Remove compat_persist as default persistence path
- Remove persist_if_needed() calls from all DML/DDL operations
- Remove persist_path and persist_suspended fields from Connection
- Replace load_persisted_state_if_present() with reload_memdb_from_pager()
  on Connection::open()
- Persistence is now handled by pager WAL, not compat_persist
- Keep compat_persist as utility for export/backup

5C.5 (bd-1w4e): Already implemented - closed as complete
- Rowid opcode already routes through cursor_rowid() which checks
  storage_cursors first, falls back to MemCursor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
